column1: # Gameplay Data Schema Template (DataTable CSV format)
# This template shows the CSV format for DataTable-driven gameplay data.
# Replace all <Thing> placeholders with system-specific names.
# - First row: field names matching F<Thing>Stats UPROPERTY names exactly
# - Enum fields use the enum value name without the E prefix (e.g.
# - Soft references use asset path strings (e.g.
# - Empty optional fields: leave the cell empty (don't write "null")
# Example rows below use an Ability stats table as illustration.
# Adapt field names and types to your system's actual data.
EXAMPLE_ITEM_1	Example Item 1	<EnumValue>	100.0	10	TRUE	description text	/Game/UI/Icons/T_Example1.T_Example1
EXAMPLE_ITEM_2	Example Item 2	<EnumValue>	250.0	25	FALSE	another description	/Game/UI/Icons/T_Example2.T_Example2
EXAMPLE_ITEM_3	Example Item 3	<EnumValue>	500.0	50	TRUE	third description	/Game/UI/Icons/T_Example3.T_Example3
